nasb.text: The entrails, however, and the legs he shall wash with water. And the priest shall offer all of it, and offer it up in smoke on the altar; it is a burnt offering, an offering by fire of a soothing aroma to the Lord.

esv.text: but the entrails and the legs he shall wash with water. And the priest shall offer all of it and burn it on the altar; it is a burnt offering, a food offering with a pleasing aroma to the Lord.

cnv.text: 那人又要用水洗淨內臟和腿，祭司就把這一切全獻在祭壇上焚燒，作為燔祭，就是獻給耶和華馨香的火祭。

ccb.text: 献祭者要用水洗净羊的内脏和腿。祭司要把这一切都放在坛上焚烧。这是燔祭，是蒙耶和华悦纳的馨香火祭。
